items.name: Product Hit
items.prompt: Object flies into frame, hits subject. Brief reaction → pivot to product.

items.name: Spicy
items.prompt: The shot starts with an extreme close-up of a collarbone, slowly tilts up to reveal a flawless makeup look, then pulls back into selfie framing before a silent pause leads into the product pitch.

items.name: Interview
items.prompt: Interviewer asks a second stranger a question based entirely on the first stranger's random answer; confusion builds until the second person naturally notices the product (Erewhon-style aspirational item) and pivots into a casual review.

items.name: Random Object Mic
items.prompt: During a casual vlog, a random absurd object falls into the person's hand from above, and they immediately use it as a microphone to continue a completely serious product review.

items.name: Product Crash
items.prompt: The product itself falls from above and destroyed, creating chaos; harsh sharpness leads to a perfectly clean and restored scene where a person calmly begins reviewing the product.

items.name: Blizzard
items.prompt: A cozy indoor scene is suddenly hit by a violent, impossible blizzard; chaos fills the room but the product remains intact and functioning, and once the storm stops, the product is still working.

items.name: Camera Bump
items.prompt: The camera operator accidentally bumps into a person, hitting their forehead; they react briefly, recover, and naturally reveal the dress (or product on it) while transitioning into a casual explanation.

items.name: Product Dodge
items.prompt: Suddenly, a product flies into a person's face; he quickly bends down to avoid a collision, and in the next frame he stands up straight and already holds the product in his hands and begins to review as if nothing had happened.

items.name: Epic Fail
items.prompt: A person performs an unsuccessful backflip, lands unsuccessfully, falls, and immediately, without pause, takes out the product and begins an unflappable review.
